parameters.prompt: Original photorealistic near-future vacuum-capable service carbine, 86 cm long, physically plausible compact receiver and barrel, folding adjustable stock, removable box magazine, low-profile optic, charging handle, selector, trigger guard, heat shielding, sling points and tool-less service latches. Functional layered metal and reinforced polymer, restrained science fiction, readable separate rigid parts. Consistent orthographic side, top, front and three-quarter views, neutral studio light, no person, hands, ammunition, text, logos, stand, or background clutter.

strengths: front, rear and side profiles agree on receiver, bore, stock and grip placement
magazine, optic, controls and service seams are visually separable
restrained hard-surface treatment supports close first-person cleanup
conditions: receiver, barrel group, stock, magazine, optic, charging handle and controls become separate rigid parts
authored 0.86 m envelope, grip reach, sight line and muzzle axis remain authoritative
generated control markings and mechanically ambiguous cavities are replaced
